templates.title: Merry Christmas, Madafakas!
templates.template: EVENT: 🎄 Each player must give a hug to the person on their right or drink 3 sips.
templates.endTemplate: Hug time is over.

templates.title: Christmas Spirit
templates.template: EVENT: 🎅 The spirit of Christmas doubles all drinks (x2) for the duration of this event.
templates.endTemplate: The Christmas spirit has left. Drinks return to normal.

templates.title: Christmas Eve Dinner
templates.template: EVENT: 🍽️ No one can talk with their mouth open (not even to drink). If someone does, they drink {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: Christmas Eve dinner is over. You can talk freely again.

templates.title: Christmas Carols Non-Stop
templates.template: EVENT: 🎶 Before each drink, you must sing a line from a Christmas carol. If you don't, drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.
templates.endTemplate: Singing is no longer required to drink.

templates.title: The Poisoned Gift
templates.template: EVENT: 🎁 If it's your turn to drink, you can 'gift' half of your sips to another player, but you always drink the other half yourself.
templates.endTemplate: Drinks can no longer be gifted.

templates.title: Worker Elf Mode
templates.template: EVENT: 🧝 Everyone must refer to the host as 'Santa'. Whoever makes a mistake drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: Santa has gone back to the North Pole.

templates.title: Snowstorm
templates.template: EVENT: ❄️ It's cold! Drinks of cold beverages are worth x3 for the duration of the storm.
templates.endTemplate: The storm has passed. Drinks are back to x1.

templates.title: No Grinch Allowed
templates.template: EVENT: 🚫 Complaining or making faces is forbidden. Whoever does, drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips for ruining Christmas.
templates.endTemplate: Grinch mode is allowed once again.

templates.title: Christmas Toast
templates.template: EVENT: 🥂 Each time someone drinks, everyone must say 'Cheers and Merry Christmas!'. Whoever forgets drinks {PUNISHMENT} sip.
templates.endTemplate: Mandatory toasts are over.

templates.title: Santa's Mittens
templates.template: EVENT: 🧤 You must drink as if you were wearing mittens (without using individual fingers). Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can use your fingers to drink again.

templates.title: The 12 Bells
templates.template: EVENT: 🔔 Each time someone drinks, they must make a bell sound 'Ding!'. If they forget, they drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.
templates.endTemplate: The bells have stopped ringing.

templates.title: Forced Secret Santa
templates.template: EVENT: 🕵️ You choose a 'Secret Santa'. Every time you drink, they drink the same amount. If they drink, you don't.
templates.endTemplate: Secret Santa is over.

templates.title: Lapland Accent
templates.template: EVENT: 🗺️ Everyone must talk as if they were very cold and their teeth were chattering. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can talk with your normal accent now.

templates.title: Christmas Lottery
templates.template: EVENT: 🎫 Roll an imaginary (or real) die. If even, your drinks are worth x2. If odd, they are worth x0.
templates.endTemplate: The lottery is over. Back to normal value.

templates.title: Royal Protocol of the Three Kings
templates.template: EVENT: 👑 You must refer to others as 'Your Majesty'. Whoever uses a real name drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: Royal protocol has ended.

templates.title: Shared Gift
templates.template: EVENT: 🤝 Each time you drink, the person to your left also drinks a sip out of Christmas solidarity.
templates.endTemplate: Christmas solidarity is over.

templates.title: Silent Night Silence
templates.template: EVENT: 🤫 You can only speak in whispers. Anyone who speaks normally drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: The silent night is over. You can shout now.

templates.title: Rudolph the Reindeer
templates.template: EVENT: 🦌 You must touch your nose (pretending it's red) before each drink. If you forget, drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.
templates.endTemplate: Rudolph has gone to rest.

templates.title: Coal for the Naughty
templates.template: EVENT: 🌑 The player who has failed the most so far receives the 'Coal': their drinks are worth x2 during this event.
templates.endTemplate: The coal has turned into a diamond (or just gone).

templates.title: Mandatory Ho Ho Ho
templates.template: EVENT: 🎅 You must end every sentence with a 'Ho Ho Ho'. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: Santa has lost his voice.

templates.title: Night Frost
templates.template: EVENT: 🧊 Everything freezes! If you don't drink your sips in less than 10 seconds, the punishment triples.
templates.endTemplate: The frost is over.

templates.title: Three Kings Cake
templates.template: EVENT: 🥮 There is an invisible 'bean'. If you have to drink an even number of sips, you drink 1 extra (the bean).
templates.endTemplate: The cake is gone.

templates.title: Christmas Star Mode
templates.template: EVENT: ⭐ The player with the shiniest clothing is the 'Star'. Everyone drinks when the Star drinks.
templates.endTemplate: The star has dimmed.

templates.title: Christmas Affection
templates.template: EVENT: ❤️ Before someone drinks, they must receive a Christmas compliment from the group or they are not allowed to drink (and drink {PUNISHMENT} punishment sips instead).
templates.endTemplate: The excess affection is over.

templates.title: Mistletoe Warning
templates.template: EVENT: 🌿 If two people stare at each other for more than 3 seconds, they must give each other a kiss on the cheek or drink {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: The mistletoe has withered.

templates.title: Santa's Suit
templates.template: EVENT: 🧥 You can't use your hands to touch your glass; someone must help you drink (or you drink {PUNISHMENT} punishment sips).
templates.endTemplate: You can use your own hands again.

templates.title: Fireplace Heat
templates.template: EVENT: 🔥 So relaxing! Drinks of people sitting down are half, drinks of people standing up are double.
templates.endTemplate: The fireplace has gone out.

templates.title: Living Nativity Mode
templates.template: EVENT: 🐑 Each player must choose an animal from the Nativity scene and make its sound before speaking. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: The Nativity scene has been disassembled.

templates.title: Grape Timer
templates.template: EVENT: 🕒 You have 12 seconds to complete any challenge assigned to you during this event. If it takes longer, drink double.
templates.endTemplate: There is no longer a rush with the grapes.

templates.title: New Year, New Life
templates.template: EVENT: 🎉 Role swap! The person who has given out the most sips so far is now the one who drinks the most, and vice versa.
templates.endTemplate: Roles return to their original state.
